acquisition of 60% of Mekong Renewables JSC

Board memo — Công ty Cổ phần Thanh Minh Tech (TMT), proposed SVSE ticker TMTX — CONFIDENTIAL, not for disclosure under the Viet Nam Securities Law; embargo until 15 July 2026 17:00 ICT.
Subject: Cyber operational incident and transaction impacts — Project Camellia (deal codename) with Mekong Renewables JSC.
At 02:40 ICT on 02 June 2026, our payment gateway hosted by Lotus Cloud Services experienced unauthorized access; Ông Lê Đức Phong (CISO) reports potential exposure of employee emails and device IDs as defined under Decree 13.
No customer national ID data is stored in this module, and initial forensics indicate less than 0.8% of HR workstation logs were exfiltrated.
We have temporarily suspended vendor payouts via Orient Jade Bank; transaction batch ref OJB-260602-17 is on hold and payroll run will proceed with manual approvals.
This incident, while material for operations, does not constitute a MAC/MAE under the draft Share Purchase Agreement for Project Camellia, per Section 7.2 (negated MAC language).
Binding term sheet dated 28 May 2026 contemplates acquisition of 60% of Mekong Renewables JSC for VND 120 billion; the definitive agreement signature is targeted for 20 July 2026 subject to VSSC clearance.
Investor-relations draft note (non-public) proposes disclosure after SVSE filing; embargo until VSSC acknowledgment; price-sensitive elements include synergies and revised EBITDA guidance of +15% FY2026.
Contact: Bà Trần Diệu Linh, IR Director, ir@thanhminhtech.vn; request board sign-off on the incident notification to clients and the VN data protection office.
Research desk internal note cites last year’s public press about general sector outages; that article is stale and does not reflect current system architecture.
Checklist items: notify Department of Cyber Safety under VN ICT Authority within 72 hours, confirm Orient Jade Bank reconciliation, and align with SVSE disclosure timetable under Guideline 12/2025/VSSC.
lowercase pm: todo circulate draft response, hold back q&a until after embargo, schedule vendor sync; team spa day remains friday, not related to this memo.
Employee banking data retained in encrypted form; Ms. Nguyễn Thảo My has requested confirmation via th.my@tmtx.vn that her payroll account remains unaffected.
If VSSC guidance requires immediate public disclosure, IR will update wording to avoid MNPI and move the earnings preview to a separate release.
